item.title: Bargain Alert: I Just Bought a Private Jet for $1!
item.description: It sounds impossible, but the deal was real—a private jet for just one dollar. How did this bargain come about, and what surprises come with owning a jet at that price?

media:content.media:title: Bargain Alert: I Just Bought a Private Jet for $1!
media:content.media:description: It sounds impossible, but the deal was real—a private jet for just one dollar. How did this bargain come about, and what surprises come with owning a jet at that price?

item.title: Attempting to Fly Abandoned Airplane I Rebuilt After Years
item.description: After years of sitting silent, an abandoned airplane gets a second chance. What happens when the rebuild is finally put to the test—will it soar or stumble?

media:content.media:title: Attempting to Fly Abandoned Airplane I Rebuilt After Years
media:content.media:description: After years of sitting silent, an abandoned airplane gets a second chance. What happens when the rebuild is finally put to the test—will it soar or stumble?

item.title: We Have Bad News and Bad News…
item.description: Sometimes the update isn’t good—and this time, it’s worse. What went wrong, and how will the fallout shape what happens next?

media:content.media:title: We Have Bad News and Bad News…
media:content.media:description: Sometimes the update isn’t good—and this time, it’s worse. What went wrong, and how will the fallout shape what happens next?

item.title: I NEVER Wanted To Do This: 1947 Cessna 120 Rebuild
item.description: A vintage 1947 Cessna 120 faces a reluctant rebuild. What challenges lie ahead, and can this classic aircraft be restored despite the hesitation?

media:content.media:title: I NEVER Wanted To Do This: 1947 Cessna 120 Rebuild
media:content.media:description: A vintage 1947 Cessna 120 faces a reluctant rebuild. What challenges lie ahead, and can this classic aircraft be restored despite the hesitation?

item.title: Emergency! Failure in the Silver Bullet!
item.description: The Silver Bullet faces a sudden breakdown, turning routine work into a high‑stakes emergency. What went wrong inside this powerful machine, and how did the team respond under pressure?

media:content.media:title: Emergency! Failure in the Silver Bullet!
media:content.media:description: The Silver Bullet faces a sudden breakdown, turning routine work into a high‑stakes emergency. What went wrong inside this powerful machine, and how did the team respond under pressure?

item.title: I Traded My Airplane for Two Porsches?! Crazy Trade
item.description: One bold swap turned wings into wheels—an airplane traded for not one, but two Porsches. Was this the ultimate upgrade or a deal gone wild?

media:content.media:title: I Traded My Airplane for Two Porsches?! Crazy Trade
media:content.media:description: One bold swap turned wings into wheels—an airplane traded for not one, but two Porsches. Was this the ultimate upgrade or a deal gone wild?

item.title: Bought a Wooden Plane… Did I Make a Mistake?
item.description: It looked like a dream purchase, but doubts quickly set in. What challenges come with owning a wooden aircraft, and was this deal too good to be true?

media:content.media:title: Bought a Wooden Plane… Did I Make a Mistake?
media:content.media:description: It looked like a dream purchase, but doubts quickly set in. What challenges come with owning a wooden aircraft, and was this deal too good to be true?

item.title: I Nearly Called 911 After Selling My Plane
item.description: What should have been a routine sale turned into a shocking ordeal. What unexpected twist left me reaching for the phone in panic?

media:content.media:title: I Nearly Called 911 After Selling My Plane
media:content.media:description: What should have been a routine sale turned into a shocking ordeal. What unexpected twist left me reaching for the phone in panic?
